aboutTitle: We grow your online presence with measurable results
aboutText: At Software Strategy we design and build modern, fast and secure websites. We improve your visibility with SEO and acquire qualified leads through SEM and social strategies.

aboutCustom.title: A weak digital presence quietly costs you opportunities
aboutCustom.paragraphHtml: Many businesses still rely only on social media, use outdated websites, or fail to appear when potential clients search for their services.
benefits: Relying only on social media channels

faqPreview.subtitle: Common questions before moving forward
faqPreview.title: What a growing business usually needs to clarify before investing
faqPreview.text: These quick answers help define the right website approach and the next practical step for your business.

items.q: What kind of website fits your current stage?
items.a: If you are starting, a landing page or a simple first website is often enough. If you need stronger credibility and clearer service communication, a full website is the better move.

items.q: How long does a professional website usually take?
items.a: Standard projects usually take between 3 and 6 weeks, depending on scope, content availability and required integrations.

items.q: Can you start simple and expand later?
items.a: Yes. We build a clear foundation so your business can grow in stages without rebuilding everything from scratch.
